## Branch

- [ ] This PR is from a **feature branch**, not directly from `main`

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] No hardcoded hex values — using CSS variables (`var(--surface)`, `var(--border)`, `var(--text)`, `var(--text-muted)`, `var(--accent)`)
- [ ] No new Tailwind colors outside the design system (`green-400`, `red-500`, etc.)
- [ ] Mobile-first — tested on a small viewport
- [ ] Auth-related changes: redirect params validated (relative paths only)
- [ ] New routes registered in `App.jsx`
